meaning: adj.密集的,林立的,重叠罗列的
examples: Moonrise is slow and serried with subtleties.
Or again if we but climb the serried mountain peaks.
Outside the city walls is the new city with serried tall buildings.
Vistas of pine trunks, straight and serried, stretch out on every side.
That makes a GPU more like a brigade marching in serried ranks.
